name: still fails loud on an invalid universal answer by delegating validation to the S-32 intake
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload x --answers bad.json --partial --out x.json --now 2026-07-04T00:00:00Z 2>e.err; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'invalid=motivation' e.err && echo universal-validated 1>&2
